title: Swathi Muthyam
desc: Story about an autistic person who defies existing social customs and traditions for a good cause.

title: Kotha Bangaru Lokam
desc: Balu falls in love with his classmate Swapna, the daughter of a rich business tycoon.

title: Skanda
desc: The prodigal son of a respected leader takes on two political rivals and forms bonds with their daughters.

title: MCA Middle Class Abbayi
desc: Nani with a photographic memory protects his sister-in-law from a criminal running an illegal road transport business.

title: Tillu Square
desc: A DJ's one-night fling unravels a web of chaos connected to his past, a year after a tumultuous love affair entangled him in a murder case.

title: Bharat Ane Nenu
desc: Inexperienced Bharat becomes Andhra Pradesh's CM, striving to reform society.

title: Mask
desc: To woo the police commissioner's daughter is no mean task as martial arts expert Anandan finds out.

title: Ayyaare
desc: Venkates is in love with a girl.Her dad reneges on his promise to let them marry

title: Slot - Dhurandar
desc: A mysterious traveler slips into Karachi's underworld, rises with precision, and secretly tears apart the ISI Underworld nexus from within, balancing danger with true justice.

title: Calvary Darshanam
desc: A Christian evangelist delivers religious discourses in a prayer meeting and offers special prayers for the needy

title: The Gambler
desc: A story of this father-son duo, as they go through various struggles to win what is important to them.

title: Hello Brother
desc: Two twins, separated at birth. Though they look alike, they are opposite in nature. A series of hilarious events take place when they cross paths.

title: Mirchi
desc: A man returns to reform his girlfriend's powerful family, only to uncover a dark past. He must navigate threats, loyalties, and secrets to save them all.

title: I
desc: Lingesan, a top model, falls in love with his co-model Diya and plans to marry her. But their joy fades when he suddenly develops severe physical deformities that upend his life.

title: Extra Ordinary Man
desc: A former movie extra tells the story of how he became a smuggler and vigilante hero.

title: The Warrior (2022)
desc: After challenging Guru, a feared gangster, Sathya is forced out of the city. Years later, he returns as a DSP, determined to take revenge and end Guru's reign.

title: Yenthavaadu Gaani
desc: Satyadeva, a righteous cop, marries a single mother and becomes devoted to her daughter. After his wife is killed, he sets out with his step-daughter to hunt down those responsible.

title: Gauravam
desc: Rajinikanth, a seasoned lawyer aiming to become a judge, is outraged when an undeserving candidate is promoted instead. Seeking revenge on the corrupt system, he chooses to defend a murderer.

title: Slot - Dhurandar
desc: A mysterious traveler slips into Karachi's underworld, rises with precision, and secretly tears apart the ISI Underworld nexus from within, balancing danger with true justice.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A fun compilation of back-to-back hilarious Telugu movie scenes, bringing nonstop laughter with the funniest moments, comic sequences, and iconic reactions.

title: Nava Manmadhudu
desc: Tamizh's life turns upside down when his father commits suicide. So, he tries to uncover the reason that prompted his father to kill himself and finds a number of people involved in it.
